mapper.select: SELECT #{placeId} AS placeId, IFNULL(ROUND(AVG(rate), 1), 0.0) AS rateAvg FROM Reviews WHERE place_id = #{placeId}

SELECT r.id AS reviewId, r.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS userNickname, r.rate, r.content, DATE_FORMAT(r.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt FROM Reviews r JOIN Users u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.place_id = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Attractions WHERE id = #{placeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Reviews (place_id, user_id, rate, content, created_at) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{userId}, #{dto.rate}, #{dto.content}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT user_id FROM Reviews WHERE id = #{reviewId}
